assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_009 (Run 2)

CTR lift validated. Pre-deployment merchant impression guarantee audit is mandatory — concentration effect may breach contractual minimums. Long-tail suppression is a catalog health concern requiring monitoring.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_009 (Run 2)

Merchant agreement compliance is the primary deployment blocker. Long-tail suppression has compound effects. Both addressable with constrained ranking after audit.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_009 (Run 2)

Two deployment-specific issues: contractual compliance risk and catalog health from concentration. Model quality not in question. Audit required before full rollout.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_009 (Ensemble, Run 2)

Consensus on both issues. Pre-deployment merchant impression guarantee audit required; catalog health monitoring recommended. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.condition: Pre-deployment merchant impression guarantee audit; 90-day catalog breadth monitoring.
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: ≥5% of contracted merchants below guaranteed thresholds.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: All merchants meet minimums; catalog breadth stable.
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Minor merchant violations requiring negotiation rather than model redesign.
